src: TimeGPT-1: production ready pre-trained Time Series Foundation Model  for forecasting and anomaly detection. Generative pretrained transformer for time series trained on over 100B data points. It's capable of accurately predicting various domains such as retail, electricity, finance, and IoT with just a few lines of code 🚀.
ja: TimeGPT-1: 予測および異常検知に対応した本番運用可能な事前学習済み時系列基盤モデル。1,000億以上のデータポイントで学習した時系列向け生成事前学習トランスフォーマー。わずか数行のコードで小売・電力・金融・IoTなど多様なドメインを高精度に予測可能 🚀
